title: Clean GUI
description: All the workstations and inventories have clean/transparent overlays
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0636cd6669a82722644136808091accd7853e6aa.png)

📋 About

All the workstations and inventories have clean/transparent overlays

❓ How to use

Copy the pack into your resource packs folder or Drag and Drop it in the Resource pack Selection. Select the pack.
